# `job describe` for [experimental](/commands/categories/experimental.md)

<div class='command-title'>Add a description to a background job.</div>

## Signature

```> job describe {flags} (id) (description)```

## Parameters

 -  `id`: The id of the job to describe.
 -  `description`: The description to assign to the job.


## Input/output types:

| input   | output  |
| ------- | ------- |
| nothing | nothing |
## Examples

Describe a newly spawned job.
```nu
> let id = job spawn { sleep 10sec }; job describe $id abc

```

Remove the description of a job.
```nu
> let id = job spawn { sleep 10sec }; job describe $id abc; job describe $id null

```
